problem: How to achieve sustained net-positive nuclear fusion at commercial scale?
mechanism: Electromagnetic induction in moving biological tissue
hypothesis: If Electromagnetic induction in moving biological tissue is applied to at, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
